ucs.title: [LLM] Volt Typhoon NTDS.dit credential theft via ntdsutil 'IFM' and vssadmin shadow copy
ucs.description: Hunts the exact credential-extraction commands documented in CISA AA24-038A for Volt Typhoon (Vanguard Panda / VOLTZITE) — ntdsutil with 'ifm'/'create full' and the vssadmin->ntds.dit copy chain. These are the precise LOTL invocations the actor used against US critical-infrastructure victims and rarely appear in normal admin activity.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent FROM datamodel=Endpoint.Processes WHERE ((Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" Processes.process="*ifm*" Processes.process="*create full*") OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" Processes.process="*create*" Processes.process="*shadow*" Processes.process="*for=C*") OR (Processes.process="*HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy*" Processes.process="*ntds.dit*") OR (Processes.process_name="esentutl.exe" Processes.process="*ntds.dit*") OR (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" Processes.process="*Win32_ShadowCopy*" Processes.process="*Create*")) BY Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// Volt Typhoon NTDS.dit dump — CISA AA24-038A invocations
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "ifm"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "create full")
    or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "create"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "shadow"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "for=C")
    or (ProcessCommandLine has "HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "ntds.dit")
    or (FileName =~ "esentutl.exe"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "ntds.dit")
    or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
         and ProcessCommandLine has "Win32_ShadowCopy"
         and ProcessCommandLine has "Create")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Volt Typhoon NTDS.dit dump — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\ntdsutil.exe"
         and CommandLine has "ifm"
         and CommandLine has "create full")
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe"
         and CommandLine has "create"
         and CommandLine has "shadow"
         and CommandLine has "for=C")
    or (CommandLine has "HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy"
         and CommandLine has "ntds.dit")
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\esentutl.exe"
         and CommandLine has "ntds.dit")
    or (NewProcessName has_any ("\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe")
         and CommandLine has "Win32_ShadowCopy"
         and CommandLine has "Create")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Volt Typhoon NTDS.dit Credential Theft Chain
id: 6b9f0d2a-7e4d-4b1f-93b1-6a9a5b7c2e10
status: experimental
description: Detects the ntdsutil 'IFM' and vssadmin shadow-copy + ntds.dit copy chain documented for Volt Typhoon (Vanguard Panda) by CISA AA24-038A.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-038a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.003
  - attack.g1017
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  ntdsutil_ifm:
    Image|endswith: '\ntdsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'ifm'
      - 'create full'
  vss_shadow:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'create'
      - 'shadow'
      - 'for=C'
  ntds_copy:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy'
      - 'ntds.dit'
  esentutl_ntds:
    Image|endswith: '\esentutl.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: 'ntds.dit'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (ntdsutil_ifm or vss_shadow or ntds_copy or esentutl_ntds) and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Disaster-recovery DC backup workflows (rare; should originate from a known service account)
level: critical
ucs.rationale: Volt Typhoon's CISA AA24-038A advisory and Mandiant/CrowdStrike Vanguard Panda reporting describe ntdsutil 'ac i ntds' 'ifm' 'create full c:\windows\temp\Pro' verbatim, plus vssadmin shadow + raw HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy NTDS.dit copy. These specific argument combinations are nearly absent from legitimate admin activity in production environments and are the actor's preferred all-LOTL replacement

ucs.title: [LLM] Volt Typhoon in-network pivot via 'netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4'
ucs.description: Hunts the netsh portproxy listener-binding command that Volt Typhoon (VOLTZITE / Bronze Silhouette) uses on compromised hosts to relay traffic through internal pivots and out through their KV-Botnet edge devices. This is one of the actor's most consistently documented TTPs across CISA, NSA, and Microsoft reporting and is rare in benign environments.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent FROM datamodel=Endpoint.Processes WHERE Processes.process_name="netsh.exe" Processes.process="*interface*" Processes.process="*portproxy*" Processes.process="*add*" Processes.process="*v4tov4*" NOT (Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")) BY Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=process "listenport=(?<listenport>\d+).*?connectaddress=(?<connectaddress>[\w\.]+).*?connectport=(?<connectport>\d+)" | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
// Volt Typhoon netsh portproxy pivot listener — CISA AA24-038A
let _svc_accounts = dynamic(["system","local service","network service"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where AccountName !in~ (_svc_accounts)
| where FileName =~ "netsh.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has "interface"
     and ProcessCommandLine has "portproxy"
     and ProcessCommandLine has "add"
     and ProcessCommandLine has "v4tov4"
| extend ListenPort = extract(@"(?i)listenport=(\d+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine),
         ConnectAddr = extract(@"(?i)connectaddress=([\w\.]+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine),
         ConnectPort = extract(@"(?i)connectport=(\d+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ProcessCommandLine, ListenPort, ConnectAddr, ConnectPort,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ParentAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Volt Typhoon netsh portproxy pivot — Sentinel SecurityEvent 4688
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where SubjectUserName !in~ ("SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")
| where NewProcessName endswith "\\netsh.exe"
| where CommandLine has "interface"
     and CommandLine has "portproxy"
     and CommandLine has "add"
     and CommandLine has "v4tov4"
| extend ListenPort = extract(@"(?i)listenport=(\d+)", 1, CommandLine),
         ConnectAddr = extract(@"(?i)connectaddress=([\w\.]+)", 1, CommandLine),
         ConnectPort = extract(@"(?i)connectport=(\d+)", 1, CommandLine)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ListenPort, ConnectAddr, ConnectPort,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Volt Typhoon netsh portproxy In-Network Pivot
id: 8d2e1c4f-3a55-4d4e-9c8b-2e1f4a6b9c01
status: experimental
description: Detects 'netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4' — a Volt Typhoon (VOLTZITE / Vanguard Panda) signature command for pivoting through compromised hosts toward KV-Botnet edge infrastructure. CISA AA24-038A.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa24-038a
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2023/05/24/volt-typhoon-targets-us-critical-infrastructure-with-living-off-the-land-techniques/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1090.001
  - attack.t1090.002
  - attack.g1017
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\netsh.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'interface'
      - 'portproxy'
      - 'add'
      - 'v4tov4'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  filter_svc:
    User:
      - 'SYSTEM'
      - 'LOCAL SERVICE'
      - 'NETWORK SERVICE'
  condition: selection and not (filter_machine_acct or filter_svc)
falsepositives:
  - Sysadmin troubleshooting of legacy WinRM listeners (extremely rare on user endpoints)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Volt Typhoon is uniquely distinguished from other Chinese clusters (e.g. APT41, Mustang Panda) by their commitment to LOTL plus their use of compromised SOHO routers (KV-Botnet) as the egress hop. The 'netsh interface portproxy add v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=X connectaddress=Y connectport=Z' pattern is documented verbatim in the CISA/NSA/FBI joint advisory AA24-038A and in Microsoft's
